nodes.label: AI for resizing and resolution enhancement
nodes.label_negative: Manual resizing with limited source images
nodes.grounding_span: AI can do a good job of bringing photos to the necessary resolution

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: busywork- essentially, I'll try and see if there's an AI alternative

nodes.label: AI capability in image editing
nodes.label_negative: Manual precise editing with artistic control
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like using AI for these tasks

nodes.label: AI predictability and consistency
nodes.grounding_span: it can't do it predictably, and it can't do it precisely the way I want it

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.grounding_span: it feels a little hypocritical and cannibalizing

nodes.label: Management enthusiasm for AI
nodes.grounding_span: A manager of mine has been encouraging us to utilize AI where we can

nodes.label: Creative control and precision
nodes.grounding_span: I can't rely on AI to do the same job consistently and predictably

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it just helps to expedite otherwise time consuming tasks

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I'd prefer to just prove through my work that I'm more valuable than what an AI can spit out

nodes.label: Positive toward AI for resizing
nodes.grounding_span: AI can do a good job of bringing photos to the necessary resolution

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like using AI for these tasks

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's agreeableness
nodes.grounding_span: it was really frustrating to get it to do a nice looking thing once and then never be able to replicate that

nodes.label: Indifference to workplace AI pressure
nodes.grounding_span: I really see the points of both my coworkers and my manager

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation — uses AI only for specific, bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I try and use it as piece-meal as possible in order to maintain control

nodes.label: Diplomatic bridging — navigates conflicting social expectations
nodes.grounding_span: It's definitely a lot of toeing the line at the moment
